expectations.text: Performs the analysis without editing order_service.ts or any other file
expectations.evidence: Header states 'Read-only review; no files were changed.' No edit of the fixture or any file is claimed; Scope limitations confirm only order_service.ts was read.

expectations.text: Provides recommendations rather than applying refactors
expectations.evidence: Each finding ends with a 'Recommended remediation:' (e.g. Finding 1 'Reorder to validate-then-charge-then-persist ... keep charge+persist atomic') phrased as guidance, not an applied refactor.

expectations.text: Includes at least one structural finding with a concrete remediation
expectations.evidence: Finding 2 [High] 'Mode dispatch is a scattered if/else chain with duplicated pricing logic' with concrete remediation 'Extract a single lineItemSubtotal(items) helper, then make each mode a small policy ... typed mode union with a default that throws.'
